prompt_text: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, holding Zhaozhao, a delicate little Chinese girl with big luminous dark eyes, pale soft skin, small fragile build, soft black hair in neat twin buns, in her arms at the lower frame. Gao Lingning sits on the right side in a medium close-up, briefly startled, then the corner of her lips lifts into an extremely faint, almost disbelieving hollow smile, her gaze cold and steady; Zhaozhao remains calm and motionless as an emotional anchor. Interior noble chamber, stable soft window light and muted cool-warm contrast, pale window glow against gray-teal shadows, quiet bedding and old wood tones barely visible, unchanged background emphasizing someone else's off-screen collapse. Cinematic historical drama realism, restrained Song dynasty aesthetic, female-centered subjective framing, subtle film grain, highly detailed skin and fabric, emotionally precise composition.

On the right foreground, blurred silhouette of Gao Lingning holding Zhaozhao remains visible as the perceptual center. Interior chamber with muted old wood, soft white window light, low-saturation gray-blue and brown palette, controlled natural daylight preserving negative space and relational tension. Cinematic historical drama realism, limited subjective perspective, emotional reversal, shallow depth of field, subtle dolly intimacy, fine fabric texture, restrained yet devastating atmosphere.

prompt_text: A snow-covered Jiangnan courtyard in ancient China, with Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, seated quietly at the right-front under the corridor edge, sunflower seeds visible in her hand. Zhaozhao, a delicate little Chinese girl with big luminous dark eyes, pale soft skin, small fragile build, soft black hair in neat twin buns, now older and lively, plays in the mid-right with several young men around a half-built snowman. Wide shot composition, the courtyard gate sits in the left rear third as a deep entry point, messy footprints stretch from the gate across the snow into the yard, old wooden doorframe and corridor pillars compress the frame. Cold white winter daylight spreads evenly over snow, gray courtyard walls and aged wood create a low-saturation cool-warm contrast, surface warmth in the family scene but with latent unease. Cinematic historical drama realism, Song dynasty aesthetic, environmental storytelling, crisp snow texture, restrained composition with ominous visual entrance left open.

prompt_text: Zhaozhao, a delicate little Chinese girl with big luminous dark eyes, pale soft skin, small fragile build, soft black hair in neat twin buns, now around six years old, dressed in layered winter hanfu in soft pale tones. She stands center-right in a medium long shot, bouncing as she gathers snow with bright lively energy; two young Chinese men in simple refined historical winter robes flank her loosely on left and right, another young man behind helps roll the snowman base, their interaction natural, close, and unforced. The lower foreground shows churned snow, scattered footprints, and smaller child tracks; the background leaves visible space toward the courtyard gate direction as a potential intrusion path. Cold white winter daylight over an old Jiangnan courtyard, gray walls and weathered wood, low-saturation palette with faint warmth in human presence and fragile joy that feels breakable. Cinematic historical drama realism, dynamic yet restrained steadicam feeling, crisp snow texture, emotionally foreshadowing composition, highly detailed faces, clothing, and movement.
